Headline: #72 North Temporary Eastbound Reroute near North/Pulaski.
ShortDescription: Eastbound 72 North buses are temporarily rerouted, due to street blockage near North/Pulaski.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #72 North buses are temporarily rerouted via North Avenue, Pulaski, Grand, Hamlin, North Avenue and over regular route, due to street blockage near North/Pulaski.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
